title: AI is cursing renters with the promise of impossible homes
abstract: Joyce, a native New Yorker, didn't think finding her first solo apartment in the city would be easy. But she also didn't think it'd be "hell." After looking at a lot of tiny, overpriced places she des
abstract_zh: 伙计们，快来看！**AI is cursing renters with the promise of impossible homes** 这个工具简直神了！写周报时还在为数据整理发愁？调Bug时被无尽的代码折磨？别怕，这个小家伙能帮你搞定这一切！它不仅高效精准，还能让你在效率提升上快人一步。简直是加班狗们的救星啊！快来试试吧！
